git.subject: Flatten frozen postings and add benchmark baselines

Release 8.0.0-beta.2 as consolidated npm beta
Use npm in scripts and refresh benchmark baseline for beta.2.
Add FrozenIndexBuilder for incremental frozen index builds

Harden FrozenMiniSearch binary format and parity validation.
Migrate frozen binary snapshots to MSv3 (beta.4).
Upgrade dev dependencies to clear yarn audit findings.
Upgrade TypeScript to 5.9.
Migrate to ESLint 10 with neostandard and standardize source style.
Upgrade Jest 30 and remaining dev dependencies.
Release 8.0.0 stable.
Refactor search into shared modules for mutable and frozen indexes.
Release 8.0.1.
Precompute frozen query engine params and clean FreezeSource contract.
Add MSv4 frozen binary and adaptive postings for lower memory use.
